headline: Bloom Energy (BE) Valuation Check As AI Data Center Deals And Funding Support Growth Outlook
summary: Bloom Energy (BE) is drawing fresh attention as multi gigawatt fuel cell deals for AI data centers with Oracle and Brookfield coincide with strong quarterly results, higher guidance, and management’s commitment to growth without new equity. See our latest analysis for Bloom Energy. Despite a recent pullback, including a 1 day share price return that fell 9.53% and a 30 day share price return down 7.66%, Bloom Energy’s 90 day share price return of 94.99% and very large 1 year total shareholder...

headline: Why Oracle (ORCL) Shares Are Sliding Today
summary: Shares of enterprise software giant Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) fell 8% in the afternoon session after a stronger-than-expected jobs report signaled that the Federal Reserve may keep interest rates higher for longer.
